es8311_init.tooltip: Initialize the on-board ES8311 audio: I2C 0x18 and all I2S pins are fixed, and the amplifier (IO9) is enabled automatically. The value is the recording buffer in seconds (allocated in PSRAM)

es8311_record.tooltip: Start recording, duration set by init block

es8311_has_recording.tooltip: Check if audio has been recorded

es8311_set_mic_gain.tooltip: Set ES8311 microphone analog gain (0~42dB, step 6dB)

es8311_stop.tooltip: Stop current recording or playback, clear I2S DMA buffer

es8311_play_tone.message0: ES8311 %1 play tone freq %2 Hz duration %3 ms
es8311_play_tone.tooltip: Generate and play a sine wave tone at specified frequency

es8311_alc_enable.tooltip: Enable or disable ES8311 Automatic Level Control (ALC)

es8311_record_slot.tooltip: Record to specified slot (0~3), each slot stores independently

es8311_play_loop.tooltip: Loop play recorded audio until stopped

es8311_qwen_config.message0: Configure ES8311 cloud audio understanding API Key %1 Base URL %2
es8311_qwen_config.tooltip: Configure the DashScope API key and compatible-mode base URL. WiFi connection is handled by existing WiFi blocks

es8311_qwen_audio_chat.message0: ES8311 %1 send recording to Qwen prompt %2 model %3 voice %4 playback %5
es8311_qwen_audio_chat.tooltip: Uploads the recording to Qwen Omni, streams the voice reply and stores the text result. Background mode returns once data is received; interrupt with the stop block

es8311_qwen_get_last_text.message0: get ES8311 AI last text result
es8311_qwen_get_last_text.tooltip: Return the full text result from the most recent cloud audio understanding request

es8311_qwen_get_last_success.tooltip: Check whether the most recent cloud audio understanding request succeeded

es8311_qwen_get_last_error.message0: get ES8311 AI last error message
es8311_qwen_get_last_error.tooltip: Return the error message from the most recent cloud audio understanding request

es8311_record_start.tooltip: Starts background recording and returns immediately; stop with the stop-recording block, auto-stops when the buffer is full

es8311_record_stop.tooltip: Stops background recording and keeps the actual length (under 0.1s counts as no recording)

es8311_is_recording.tooltip: Whether background recording is in progress

es8311_is_speaking.tooltip: Whether streaming/background audio is still playing

es8311_sound_level.tooltip: Samples the microphone in real time and returns the level (0~100, I2S must be configured)

es8311_stream_begin.message0: ES8311 %1 start streaming playback source rate %2
es8311_stream_begin.tooltip: Starts streaming playback, resampling the source rate to 16kHz

es8311_stream_end.tooltip: Ends streaming playback and clears the I2S DMA buffer

es8311_stream_play_url.message0: ES8311 %1 stream audio from URL %2 source rate %3
es8311_stream_play_url.tooltip: Downloads and plays 16-bit mono PCM/WAV from http(s) while streaming (WiFi required)
